Tools for font data extraction, codepoint generation, and rendering TrueType fonts for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initialization file for the font tools module in the pebble-firmware codebase.
- **[dump_font.py](dump_font.py.md)**: A tool for extracting and displaying glyph data from Pebble font files, supporting various output formats.
- **[emit_codepoints.py](emit_codepoints.py.md)**: Generates codepoint and UTF-8 files for TrueType fonts in a specified directory.
- **[fontgen.py](fontgen.py.md)**: Generates font data structures from TTF files for Pebble firmware, supporting compression and encoding.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Python scripts to render TrueType fonts into .h files for Pebble's text rendering routines.
